_comment: Curated US high-impact macro events with irregular dates (FOMC, CPI, PPI). Regular events (monthly NFP = first Friday 08:30 ET; weekly jobless claims = Thursday 08:30 ET) are DERIVED in calendar.py and need not be listed here. Times are ET. Refresh FOMC from federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/fomccalendars.htm and CPI/PPI from bls.gov release schedules. Dates are the decision/release day.
